steps: Original ratio orange:lemonade = 3:5, total parts = 8. Original total = 2.4 L = 2400 ml. Original orange = (3/8) × 2400 = 900 ml. Original lemonade = (5/8) × 2400 = 1500 ml. New total = 4 L = 4000 ml. Keeping same ratio, new orange needed = (3/8) × 4000 = 1500 ml. Extra orange = 1500 − 900 = 600 ml.
